source: Rocky Linux 'About systemd' guide - Important directories & config

questions.q: Which directory holds the unit files distributed with installed RPM packages?
questions.why: /usr/lib/systemd/system/ contains package-provided unit files (like the old /etc/init.d/).

questions.q: Of the three unit-file directories, which has the HIGHEST priority?
questions.why: Priority ascends /usr/lib < /run < /etc, so /etc/systemd/system/ wins - it's where enable links and admin overrides live.

options: Unit files created at run time

questions.q: Which file configures the system instance of systemd's basic manager settings?
questions.why: /etc/systemd/system.conf (see man 5 systemd-system.conf) controls the system manager; user.conf is for the user instance.
